title: Mountain Seasons Wheel
description: A seasons game where kids match mountain weather, clothing, and nature clues using the choose-one engine.
learningGoals: Recognize winter, spring, summer, and autumn clues
Connect seasonal weather with clothing choices
Sort nature and activity symbols by season
interactionModel: choose-one tap cards after a spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and the prompt again.
credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
